testimonials.name: Tannu Verma

testimonials.name: Rahul Mehta

faqs.question: Do I need prior experience in data analytics or programming?
faqs.answer: No prior experience is required. Our program is designed for beginners and starts from the absolute fundamentals of Excel before moving on to SQL, Power BI, and Python.

faqs.question: How much time commitment is required per week?
faqs.answer: We recommend dedicating approximately 10-15 hours per week. This includes attending live sessions (or watching recordings) and completing hands-on assignments and projects.

faqs.question: Will I get help if I'm stuck on a project or code?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. You'll have 24/7 access to our dedicated Discord support community, weekly live Q&A doubt-clearing sessions with teaching assistants, and 1:1 mentorship when needed.

faqs.question: Do you provide placement guarantee or career support?
faqs.answer: We provide a complete Career Success Program. This includes comprehensive placement assistance, 1-on-1 resume reviews, LinkedIn profile optimization, mock interviews, and direct referrals to our hiring partners.

faqs.question: Is Python mandatory for Data Analytics, or is Excel/SQL enough?
faqs.answer: While many entry-level jobs only require Excel and SQL, learning Python makes you a highly competitive candidate for premium roles and higher salary packages. Our curriculum covers Python extensively to future-proof your career.

faqs.question: Can I switch batches if my schedule changes?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer highly flexible learning options. If your work or college schedule changes, you can request to be moved from a weekday batch to a weekend batch (and vice versa) subject to seat availability.

faqs.question: What are the prerequisites for this GenAI course?
faqs.answer: Basic understanding of Python programming and standard variables/loops is recommended. No prior Machine Learning or Deep Learning background is required, as we cover the necessary fundamentals from scratch.

faqs.question: Do I need a high-end PC or GPU for this course?
faqs.answer: Not at all! You don't need expensive hardware. All heavy computations and model training will be done using cloud-based platforms (like Google Colab, Hugging Face spaces) and API integrations. A standard laptop with a good internet connection is completely fine.

faqs.question: Will I have to pay extra for OpenAI/Claude API credits?
faqs.answer: No. Standard access and lab environments with token credits are covered inside the program to ensure seamless learning. We will also teach you how to leverage open-source models (like Llama 3) entirely for free.

faqs.question: What kind of projects will we build in this course?
faqs.answer: You will build 10+ production-ready applications, including multi-agent AI systems, custom RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) chatbots trained on private PDF/company data, and automated content generation workflows using LangChain and vector databases.

faqs.question: Are there job opportunities for GenAI freshers?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The demand for AI Engineers, Prompt Engineers, and LLM Developers is at an all-time high. Our program includes specialized AI resume building, portfolio creation, and direct mock interviews with Senior AI Scientists to make you job-ready.

faqs.question: What happens if I miss a live masterclass?
faqs.answer: Every live session is recorded and uploaded to your student portal within 24 hours. You will have lifetime access to all session recordings, code repositories, and study materials.

faqs.question: Do I need any previous coding background for MERN track?
faqs.answer: Basic understanding of HTML/CSS is helpful, but not required. We cover absolute basics of Javascript before building complex React and backend systems.

faqs.answer: Yes! Modern web apps require Next.js for optimization, so an entire comprehensive module is dedicated to Next.js production architectures.
